next_steps: Set access.nodes[].ip on inventory/manual/systems/rustfs-{a,b,c,d}.json from query --live ct_ip per node.
Ensure internal DNS (BIND) resolves each node hostname used in RUSTFS_VOLUMES (rustfs-a … rustfs-d or FQDNs from cluster_dns_suffix).
Set vault HDC_RUSTFS_ACCESS_KEY and HDC_RUSTFS_SECRET_KEY before production use (auto-generated on first deploy if missing).
Add BIND A records for rustfs.s3_public_url and rustfs.console_public_url hostnames → nginx-waf WAN IP.
Add nginx-waf sites: S3 API upstream pool to all four CT IPs on port 9000 with client_max_body_size "0"; console site to port 9001 on a healthy node.
Run: node apps/hdc-cli/cli.mjs run service bind maintain --
Run: node apps/hdc-cli/cli.mjs run service nginx-waf maintain -- --site rustfs-s3 --site rustfs-console
LAN S3 endpoint: http://<ct-ip>:9000; console: http://<ct-ip>:9001 (default credentials must be rotated after first login).
